betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Gas Charge Pad§f is a §6single block§f tile that refills the §6oxygen tanks§f of a §6Space Suit§f (10049) when the player stands on it. It is the §6ground-side life support infrastructure§f — every launch pad, space station, and planetary outpost needs at least one to keep the crew alive during suit refill.

§6Production Path (oxygencharger.json)§f:
- Type: §6minecraft:crafting_shaped§f
- Pattern (3×3):
  ```
  f i f
  t b t
  p c p
  ```
- Key: `f`=§6fanSteel§f (forge:ore_dict), `i`=§6advancedrocketry:misc:0§f (User Interface), `t`=§6advancedrocketry:fueltank§f (Monopropellant Fuel Tank), `b`=§6libvulpes:structuremachine§f, `p`=§6plateSteel§f (forge:ore_dict), `c`=§6minecraft:heavy_weighted_pressure_plate§f
- Output: 1x §6Gas Charge Pad§f (advancedrocketry:oxygencharger)
- Power: 30 RF/t continuous

The pad draws §6liquid oxygen§f from an adjacent tank or fluid duct. The player walks onto the pad, the GUI shows the suit's current oxygen %, and on right-click the suit is fully refilled in §62 seconds§f. The pad also refills §6monopropellant fuel§f for jet boots.

The charge pad is a prerequisite for the §6Airlock Door§f (10053) and the §6Atmosphere Analyzer§f (10062). It is required for every §6launch pad§f in the AR progression because rockets departing for vacuum destinations must have a fully charged suit at takeoff.

§eTip§f: Place the pad inside an §6airlock§f so players can charge up before opening the outer door. For faster refills, use a §6Tier 3 Fluid Tank§f (chain) with 64,000 mB capacity to refill 5+ suits before needing a refill.
